channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Cross-Border Law Enforcement Collaboration for Countering North Korea’s Crypto Plunder
item.description: The decentralized characteristics of cryptocurrencies strengthen North Korea's incentives to target crypto assets. An international framework is needed to secure law enforcement cooperation from jurisdictions that serve as safe havens for DPRK money laundering activities.

item.title: States Weekly: March 25, 2026
item.description: This edition of States Weekly covers March 25, 2026.

item.title: Qualified Infrastructure Authorization: A Blueprint for Faster, Smarter Federal Permitting
item.description: This analysis proposes the Qualified Infrastructure Authorization framework to streamline U.S. energy permitting by cutting delays and duplication while strengthening environmental protections, public engagement, and regulatory certainty.

item.title: Clayton Seigle in NYT: Blockade Iran’s Oil
item.description: The best approach to curbing Iran’s oil exports is to impose a naval blockade of tankers carrying Iranian oil, writes CSIS’s Clay Seigle in The New York Times.
